reviews.comment:
Estación A.C.A, buena atención, ahora remodelada sin servicio de engrase, lavado y cambio de aceite. Tiene cocheras con buen servicio, sin ascensor y escaleras mal diseñadas en altura de escalones. Es cara para los socios a tarifa.

(Translated by Google)
A.C.A. station, good service, now remodeled but without lubrication, washing, or oil change services. It has parking with good service, but no elevator and poorly designed stairs with steep steps. It's expensive for members at the regular rate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNlpxMHV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Servicio muy LERDO, atienden un lado del surtidor por persona. Si haces algún comentario se ofenden.

(Translated by Google)
Very SLOW service, they serve one side of the pump per person. If you make any comments, they get offended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRd1l5TDlRRRAB
